do i have to level her up to a certain level before changing class ? or at any level
Any level, but you generally want to level them to retain the useful passives
For example, on Lanavaille you can level her to 25 to get the defensive Knight passives before swapping her to Fighter (where she'll be level 1 but keep all the non knight only skills)
